insight: Per-type command permission gating in ChatControl follows a shared pattern: define the permission constant with a trailing dot (e.g. MUTE_TYPE = "chatcontrol.command.mute."), set the base perm via setPermission(PREFIX.substring(0, length-1)), then call checkPerm(PREFIX + type.getKey()) in onCommand right after resolving the type enum, and filter tabComplete with hasPerm(PREFIX + type.getKey()). CommandToggle/CommandTag are the reference implementations. Mute keys are player/channel/server/proxy.
